name: Count Ymir, High Priest
description: I am a glintstone sorcerer. We study the stars, and examine the life therein.

name: Dragon Communion Priestess
description: Warrior true. Picture yourself. Feasting upon a dragon's essence.

name: Dryleaf Dane
description: Dryleaf Dane is an NPC in Elden Ring. He is an NPC exclusive to the Shadow of the Erdtree expansion. Dryleaf Dane is a master of hand-to-hand combat and is a fervent follower of Miquella. He leaves a Monk's Missive for travelers to find and wish to seek a challenge and learn the way of the warrior.

name: Fire Knight Queelign (NPC)
description: Queen Marika, mother to us all.

name: Hornsent
description: Your kind are not forgiven. The Erdtree is my people's enemy. By Marika long betray'd, set aflame."

name: Igon
description: Graaaaaargh! Bayle the Dread! You shall haunt me no longer!

name: Jolan
description: This is the night I know. Our Night...

name: Moore
description: Hello there. Together, we work. Together for Miquella the Kind. Many things we have found.

name: Needle Knight Leda
description:
Come now. Touch the withered arm, and travel to the realm of shadow. 
 I will not be far behind, may we meet again.

name: Redmane Freyja
description: Lady Leda spoke of you. You're that Tarnished, guided here by Kindly Miquella. Weren't we all. I am Redmane Freyja. I once fought alongside Radahn. I'll hold my own in battle.

name: Sir Ansbach
description: You must be the Tarnished. I am Sir Ansbach. Formerly in service to Lord Mohg. But now, like you, guided by Miquella.

name: St. Trina
description: Godhood would be Miquella's prison. A caged divinity... is beyond saving.

name: Thiollier
description: Oh, hello there. Are you the Tarnished? Lady Leda spoke of you. Another Tarnished guided here by Miquella. My name is Thiollier. I too am Tarnished, and here on Miquella's account. So, well... here's to new beginnings, I suppose.
